titleStmt.title: SII 39.107: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 107. (A.R. No. 107 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SIVADHARMAPURIŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH AND WEST WALL OF THE STORE ROOM ATTACHED TO THE SAME KITCHEN MĀṞAVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN KULAŚĒKHARA DĒVA-4TH YEAR, SAKA 1231 (1309 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription records the sale of land to a devotee of the temple of Tirukkōḷakkuḍi-uḍaiyanāyaṉār named Aḻagiyadēvar alias Paramēśvararabhaṭṭar by Kaṉṉimalaināḍāḻvāṉ and others of the same place, probably for performing pūja. Taxes on Kammāla, Paṟaiyar were exempted.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śrīmaikkittikku mel komārupaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī kula cekara
tevakku yāṇṭu 4 vatu śakābdam 1000 2 100 3 10 1 Itiṉ mel cellā niṉṟa kaṉṉi nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu
Ēkādaśiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇaṟpūcattu nāḷ puṟamalaināṭṭu tirukkoḷakkuṭi maṟamutalika
ḷil kaṉṉimalai nāṭāḻvāṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārom Eṅkaḷūrkku potukāṇi Irācentira coḻaṉ kuṭikkāṭum ceḻiya
ṉ Ēmpalum vayalum Āka Ikkuṭikkāṭu Iraṇṭum perunāṉ kellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nīrnilamum naṉcey puṉceyum
nattamum tōṭṭamum menokkiya maramum kiṇekkiya kiṉaṟum kuḷamum kuḷapparippu maṟṟum Ikkuṭikkāṭukaḷukku peṟunāṉ
kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa camatta prāptikaḷum Emmil Icainta vilaipporuḷukku kāṇiyāka koṇṭu nāṅkaḷ tirukko
ḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉākku Eṅkaḷ kāṇikaḷukku nāṅkaḷ tevatāṉak kaṭamai Irukkum
Iccil taṉ Eḻumpotu Uḷḷiṭṭār kāṇiyāṉa koṭṭivayal paṟṟukku Irukkum Accu kūṟu Oṉpatil Oṉ
niṉṟa kūṟu Eṭṭil Oru kūṟu Inta Irācentira coḻaṉ kuṭikaṭṭukkum ceḻiya yaṉ kuṭi kāṭṭukkum tevatāṉa kaṭamai vik
yāka raṇṭu Anupokiyār Uḷaroveṉṟu Orukālāvatu mirukālāvatu muṟkūṟa Immoḻikeṭṭu piṟkūṟa koḷveṉeṉṟa mēṟpaṭiyūr Uṭai
koḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār koyiṟ pūcikkum nampimāriṉ Aḻakiya tevaṉ cokkaṉāṉa na paṭṭarkku Ivvūr maṟamutalikaḷil kannimalai nāṭāḻ
ro vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Eṅkaḷ potukkāṇiyāṉa Irācentiracoḻa kuṭikkāṭum ceḻiyataraiyaṉ Ēmpalum
ka Ikkuṭikkāṭiraṇṭum perunāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nīrnilamu naṉcey puṉceyyum meṉokkiya maramum kiḻnokkiya kiṇaṟum nattamun toṭṭamun
kuḷa vum Oṭaiyumuṭaippum kuṭikkāṭukaḷ perunāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa samasta prāptikaḷum Uḷpaṭṭa Emmil Icainta vilaipporuḷ
viṟṟu poruḷarak koṇṭu
teṉpāṟkellai puṟaṅkoṭṭai vay kku pokiṟa peruvaḻikku vaṭakkum mevapāṟ kellai �
ttukkup pokiṟa peruvaḻikku teṟkkum Āka Icainta perunāṉ kellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nīrnilam nañcey puñceyum melnokkiya maramum kīḻṇokkiya kiṇaṟum nat
tamum toṭṭamum kuḷamum kuḷapparappum Oṭaiyu muṭaippum maṟṟum Ivvayalkaḷ perunāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa samastaprāptikaḷuma Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷukku vilaikkuṟa viṟṟu poruḷa vilaiyāvaṉṉak kaḷattil kāṭṭa
yeṟṟi vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom kaṉnimalai nāṭāḻvāṉ Uḷḷuṭṭārom nampiyār Aḻakiyatevaṉ cokkaṉārāṉa paramecurapaṭṭarkku Ippaṭiviṟṟa Ikkuṭikkāṭukaḷil kuḷaṅkaḷil te
ṉ kaṭai kaṭṭik koḷvārākavum Ikku Ikku meṟku nokki kālveṭṭik koḷvārākavum Ikkuḷattil koṭṭi vayalil Ēriṉa maṭṭam Ēruvatākavum Ippaṭi viṟṟa Ikkuṭikkāṭukaḷukku
t tevatāṉa Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉārkku nāṅkaḷ Eṅkaḷ kāṇip paṟṟukaḷukku niṟcayita kaṇmāḷa paṟaiyar ciṟṟāyamum Īḻam puñceyvariyum potuvil kaḻittu nikki
niṉṟa Ac kku mātaṉ Eḻumperuṅ Uḷḷiṭṭār Irukkum kaṭamai Oṉpatil Oru kūṟu nikki nikki niṉṟa kū ru kūṟṟil Oru kūṟu Inta Irācentiracoḻaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭa kuṭikāṭukaḷukku tevatāṉak kaṭamai yi
ṟuttu cantirātittavar kāṇiyāka Aṉupovippārākavum Ippaṭiye yoḻiya veṟu Ēṟṟa curukkañ collak kaṭavomallavākavum Ippaṭikku Ikkuṭikāṭukaḷukku Ituve vilai yolai yāvatākavum veṟuvilai
last line damaged
Digital edition of SII 39.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
